title: rollandia calycina
intro: Rollandia calycina, also known as the "Calyce", is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rollandia calycina include relief from fever, pain, and infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Rollandia calycina typically involve boiling the leaves and roots in water to create a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
